description_long: This is a ceiling-mounted pendant lamp featuring a cylindrical fabric shade with a subtle geometric pattern. Inside the shade, a classic chandelier-style frame holds four candle-shaped bulb sockets, each with a faux candle sleeve. The lamp is suspended by a metal chain, which connects to the top center of the shade. The frame and chain are finished in a light, neutral color that complements the translucent shade. The overall design blends traditional chandelier elements with a modern drum shade, creating a soft, diffused lighting effect. This lamp is suitable for indoor urban environments such as lobbies, hallways, or upscale public spaces.
description: A ceiling pendant lamp with a cylindrical fabric shade and an internal chandelier frame holding four candle-style bulbs, suspended by a metal chain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical fabric shade and the internal chandelier frame with four candle-style bulbs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the side of the shade and the arrangement of the chandelier arms inside.
description_view_2: Direct side view emphasizing the symmetry of the shade and the even spacing of the bulbs within.
description_view_3: Another angled view highlighting the chain attachment and the internal chandelier structure from a different perspective.
